create_shipment.buy_needs_full_address: Koma zuwa “Cikakkun adireshi” don sayen wannan farashi.
create_shipment.contents_explanation_lab: Bayanin abin da ke ciki (ana bukata don "Wani"):
create_shipment.customs_certify_checkbox: Na tabbatar cewa bayanan da aka bayar gaskiya ne
create_shipment.customs_group_title: Bayanin kwastam (ana bukata don kayan aikawa na kasa da kasa)
create_shipment.customs_hts_hint: Kuna bukatar lambar fito? Yi amfani da shafin Bincike HTS.
create_shipment.customs_intro: Kamfanonin jigilar kaya suna ƙin sayar da lambar aikawa sai an cika cikakkun bayanan kwastam a duk wani kunshin da ke ƙetare iyakar kasa da kasa.
create_shipment.customs_signer_label: Sunan mai sa hannu kan kwastam:
create_shipment.customs_validation_body: Wannan kunshin yana ƙetare iyakar kasa da kasa. Fara cika sashin kwastam: nau'in abin da ke ciki, sunan mai sa hannu, tabbatarwa, da aƙalla abu ɗaya na kwastam tare da bayani, yawa, daraja, nauyi, da kasar asali.
create_shipment.delete_package_confirm_b: Share ajiyayyen kunshin '{name}'? Ba za a iya soke wannan ba.
create_shipment.get_rates_error_body:
Ba a iya samo farashi ba:
{error}
create_shipment.missing_addresses_body: Fara tabbatar da aƙalla adireshi biyu a Littafin Adireshi.
create_shipment.missing_name_body: Wannan kunshin yana ƙetare iyakar kasa da kasa. Kamfanonin jigilar kaya suna bukatar suna ko kamfani a kan adireshin farawa da na isarwa duka biyu don sanarwar kwastam — fara ƙara suna ko kamfani ga kowannensu a Littafin Adireshi.
create_shipment.missing_phone_body: Wannan kunshin yana ƙetare iyakar kasa da kasa. Kamfanonin jigilar kaya suna bukatar lambar waya a kan adireshin farawa da na isarwa duka biyu — fara ƙara lambar waya ga kowannensu a Littafin Adireshi.
create_shipment.missing_zip_body: Shigar da lambar gidan waya don wurin tashi da wurin zuwa.
create_shipment.no_label_yet: Ba a sayi lambar aikawa ba tukuna.
create_shipment.no_rates_body: EasyPost bai bayar da wani farashi ba don wannan kunshin.
create_shipment.non_delivery_label: Idan ba a iya kai wa ba:
create_shipment.preview_failed: An kasa loda hoton lambar. Yi amfani da maɓallan da ke ƙasa don buɗe ta ko ajiye ta.
create_shipment.preview_placeholder: Lambar za ta bayyana a nan bayan an saya.
create_shipment.preview_unavailable: Wannan lambar fayil ne na PDF, ba za a iya nuna ta a nan ba. Yi amfani da maɓallan da ke ƙasa don buɗe ta ko ajiye ta.
create_shipment.purchased_body: An sayi lambar aikawa cikin nasara.
create_shipment.purchased_no_label: An saya, amma ba a bayar da adireshin yanar gizo na lambar aikawa ba.
create_shipment.purchased_result_text:
An saya. Lambar bibiya: {tracking_code}
Lambar aikawa: {label_url}
create_shipment.save_label_button: Ajiye lambar aikawa a matsayin PDF…
create_shipment.save_label_error_body:
Ba a iya ajiye lambar aikawa ba:
{error}
create_shipment.save_package_dialog_labe: Sanya wa wannan kunshin suna don sake amfani da shi daga baya:
create_shipment.title: Kirkiri Kunshi & Kwatanta Farashi
create_shipment.zip_mode_note: Duba farashi kawai. Sayen lamba yana buƙatar cikakkun adireshi a bangarorin biyu, don haka koma zuwa “Cikakkun adireshi” don siya.
dashboard.placeholder_text: Ana ƙara kayan aikawa, bibiya, littafin adireshi, da ra'ayoyin rahoto a matakan ginawa na gaba. Yi amfani da Saitunan don sarrafa maɓallan API.
dashboard.title: Allon Bayanai
donation_banner.message: Idan EasyPost Desktop na da amfani a gare ku, ku yi la'akari da tallafawa cigabanta.

history.refund_status_body: Matsayin mayar da kudi na yanzu: {status}
history.refund_submitted_body: An nemi mayar da kudi. Kamfanin jigilar kaya zai tabbatar daga baya — yi amfani da 'Duba matsayin mayar da kudi' don duba sakamakon karshe.
history.table_group_title: Kayan aikawa da aka saya (wannan yanayin)
history.title: Tarihin Aikawa
hts_lookup.intro: Bincika lambobin Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS) don sanarwar kwastam, ta amfani da bayanan kai-tsaye daga Hukumar Kasuwancin Kasa da Kasa ta Amurka. Don bayani kawai, ba shawarar kwastam ko ta shari'a ba — daidaita nau'in kayanku daidai alhakinku ne.
hts_lookup.search_placeholder: Bincika ta kalmar bincike (misali "waya ta jan ƙarfe") ko lambar HTS
hts_lookup.status_idle: Shigar da kalmar bincike ko lambar HTS don bincike.
hts_lookup.status_live: Bayanan kai-tsaye daga Hukumar Kasuwancin Kasa da Kasa ta Amurka.
hts_lookup.status_no_results: Ba a sami lambar HTS da ta dace ba.
hts_lookup.status_offline_cache: Ba a kan layi ba — ana nuna sakamakon da aka adana a baya, wanda watakila ba na yanzu ba ne.
hts_lookup.status_searching: Ana bincike a cikin rumbun bayanai na Hukumar Kasuwancin Kasa da Kasa ta Amurka…
hts_lookup.title: Bincike Lambar HTS
insurance.intro_text: Ga kayan aikawa da aka saya ta wannan manhajar, yi amfani da maballin Yi Inshora a Tarihi maimakon. Yi amfani da wannan fam din kawai ga lambobin aikawa da aka saya a wajen EasyPost wanda kuke so ku yi wa inshora.
insurance.missing_info_body: Ana bukatar lambar bibiya, kamfanin jigilar kaya, da darajar kunshin.
insurance.purchase_failed:
Ba a iya sayen inshora ba:
{error}
insurance.title: Yi Inshorar Kunshi
license_gate.buy_soon_body: Saye ta yanar gizo ba ta samu ba tukuna. Da fatan za a sake dubawa nan ba da daɗewa ba.
license_gate.buy_soon_title: Saye na zuwa nan ba da daɗewa ba
license_gate.invalid_body: Ba a gane wannan maɓallin lasisi ba. Ka tabbata ka kwafi maɓallin gaba ɗaya daga imel ɗin sayenka, ko ka tuntuɓi tallafi.
license_gate.subtitle: Shigar da maɓallin lasisi da ka karɓa ta imel bayan sayenka don buɗe manhajar.
license_gate.title: Kunna Easy-Post Desktop

Kuna cikin yanayin AIKI NA GASKIYA. {description}

Wannan zai caji asusun EasyPost naku da kudi na gaskiya. Ci gaba?
reports.spend_chart_title: Kashe kudi ta kamfanin jigilar kaya
reports.summary_label: Jimlar kashe kudi (wannan yanayin): {total_spend}  |  Lambobin aikawa da aka saya: {labels_purchased}
reports.title: Tarihi & Rahoto
settings.label_applies_note: Ya shafi sabbin jigilar kaya, har da na rukuni. Masu jigilar kaya suna tsayar da girman lamba lokacin ƙirƙirar jigila, don haka wannan ba ya canza lambobin da aka riga aka saya.
settings.label_caveat_dhl: DHL Express na goyon bayan 4x6, 4x7, 4x8 da 8.5x11.
settings.label_caveat_ups: UPS na dawo da 4x7 sai an sauya. 4x6 yana aiki a ZPL kawai, sai dai idan Tallafin EasyPost ya kunna 4x6 PNG don asusunka (jigilar cikin gida kawai). 4x7 da 4x8 lambar 4x6 ce da aka ƙara mata fili.
settings.label_caveat_zpl_only: LaserShip da OnTrac na goyon bayan 4x6 da 4x8 a ZPL kawai.
settings.language_restart_note: Sake kunna manhajar don canjin harshe ya fara aiki sosai.
settings.title: Saitunan
settings.webhook_checkbox_label: Kunna sabuntawar push ta webhook (yana buƙatar cloudflared)
settings.webhook_status_stopped: Ba ya gudana. Bibiya na ci gaba da sabuntawa ta hanyar bincike duk bayan mintuna 5.
setup_wizard.key_required_body: Shigar da aƙalla maɓallin API ɗaya (na gwaji ko na gaskiya) don ci gaba.
setup_wizard.subtitle: Manna maɓallan API na EasyPost naku a ƙasa. Ana ajiye su lafiya a cikin mai sarrafa shaidar tsarin aiki naku a wannan na'urar — ba a taɓa ajiye su a rubuce a fili ba, kuma ba a aika su zuwa ko'ina sai API na EasyPost.
setup_wizard.title: Haɗa asusun EasyPost naku
tracking.carrier_placeholder: Kamfanin jigilar kaya (na zaɓi, misali USPS)
